zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Aston of Warwickshire於1288年出生在英國瓦維其可爾卡素 布洛維其時，她的父親Ralph de Aston38歲，母親Louise Parker38歲。她和Anselme de Bromwich至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1355年在英國瓦維其可爾阿斯頓享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Aston of Warwickshire于1288年出生在英国瓦維其可爾卡素 布洛維其时，她的父亲Ralph de Aston38岁，母亲Louise Parker38岁。她和Anselme de Bromwich至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1355年在英国瓦維其可爾阿斯頓享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Ad(e)stan, which is usually from Old English Æthelstān (see Alston ). It may also be from the much rarer Old English name Ēadstān.
habitational name from any of several places in England called Aston. Most were named with Old English ēast ‘east’ + tūn ‘settlement’. In a few cases the first element is æsc ‘ash tree’.

variants.name: Alston
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Alstan, which is a coalescence of several different Old English personal names: Æthelstān ‘noble stone’, Ælfstān ‘elf stone’, Ealdstān ‘old stone’, or Ealhstān ‘temple stone’.

habitational name from any of various places called Alston (in Cumbria, Lancashire, Devon, and Somerset) or Alstone (in Gloucestershire and Staffordshire). With the exception of Alston in Cumbria, which is formed with the Old Norse personal name Halfdan, these placenames all consist of an Old English personal name + Old English tūn ‘settlement’, for example Ælfsige in the case of Alstone in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Aston of Warwickshire was born in 1288, in Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, England, her father, Ralph de Aston, was 38 and her mother, Louise Parker, was 38. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Anselme de Bromwich. She died in 1355, in Aston, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Aston of Warwickshire est née en 1288, à Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Aston, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Louise Parker, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Anselme de Bromwich. Elle est décédée en 1355, à Aston, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Aston of Warwickshire 1288 in Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph de Aston 38 und ihre Mutter Louise Parker 38. Sie hatte mit Anselme de Bromwich mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1355 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Aston, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Aston of Warwickshire è nata il nel 1288 nel Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Ralph de Aston, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Louise Parker, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Anselme de Bromwich. Morì nel 1355, nel Aston, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Aston of Warwickshireが1288年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアカストル ブロムウィチで生まれた時，父Ralph de Astonは38歳，母Louise Parkerは38歳であった。彼女はAnselme de Bromwichとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1355年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストンで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Aston of Warwickshire(이)가 1288년 영국 워윅실르 카스틀 브롬위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Aston(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Louise Parker(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 Anselme de Bromwich(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1355년 영국 워윅실르 애스턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Aston of Warwickshire nasceu em 1288, em Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Aston, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Louise Parker, tinha 38 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Anselme de Bromwich. Ela faleceu em 1355, em Aston, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Aston of Warwickshire родилась в 1288 г. в местности кастл бромвич, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph de Aston было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Louise Parker, 38. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Anselme de Bromwich. Она умерла в 1355 г. в местности астон, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Aston of Warwickshire nació en 1288, en Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Aston, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Louise Parker, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Anselme de Bromwich. Murió en 1355, en Aston, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
